faqHtml:
Frequently Asked Questions

Is it possible to have a good relationship if our chakras are 'unbalanced'?

An 'unbalanced' chakra is the human condition. The goal is not a static state of perfect balance, but a dynamic, ongoing practice of returning to center. A good relationship isn’t one without blockages; it’s one where both partners are committed to clearing them. An ordinary relationship can become an extraordinary one when you both commit to doing the energetic work. It’s the difference between being roommates who occasionally have sex and being true partners in spiritual evolution.

My partner isn't interested in any of this. Can I work on our energetic connection by myself?

Yes. You are 50% of the energetic equation. By working on your own chakras—clearing your blocks, opening your channels, and bringing your own system into greater balance—you fundamentally change the dynamic of the relationship. Your presence becomes an invitation for your partner to meet you at a new level. While their conscious participation would accelerate the process, your solo work is never wasted. It will, at the very least, bring you into a more profound and honest relationship with yourself, which is the foundation for everything else. Don't just read this. Use it. Fight with it. Let it change you.
